title: Quantum Scattering Theory Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: psi_k(r) ~ e^(ik.r) + f(theta)*e^(ikr)/r; f(theta) = sum_l (2l+1)*e^(i*delta_l)*sin(delta_l)*P_l(cos theta)/k
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Quantum Scattering Theory

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=35) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class Numerov integration per partial wave; Kohn variational method provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
